summary: Priority 1 tasks verified and bug fixes applied. Task 1: Dashboard job links correctly navigate to /dashboard/jobs?jobId={id} and auto-open job modal. Task 2: Customer verbal findings access control fixed - customers cannot see Edit/Save buttons and form fields are disabled on both Stones and Jobs pages.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Dashboard job links navigate to /dashboard/jobs?jobId={id}
TEST 1.1: Job modal opens automatically from dashboard navigation
TEST 2.1: Customer cannot see Edit button (Stones page)
TEST 2.2: Customer cannot see Save button (Stones page)
TEST 2.3: Customer form fields are disabled (Stones page)
TEST 3.1: Customer cannot see Edit button (Jobs page stone modal)
TEST 3.2: Customer cannot see Save button (Jobs page stone modal)
TEST 3.3: Customer form fields disabled (Jobs page stone modal)
TEST 3.4: Customer cannot see Upload Scan button (Jobs page)
TEST 4.1: Admin CAN see Edit/Save buttons

fixes_applied.issue: openStoneDialog function set verbalEditMode=true for all users, not just admins
Edit button shown without isAdmin check
Save button shown without isAdmin check
Certificate Scan upload button visible to customers

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both priority 1 tasks are now working: 1) Dashboard job links navigate properly with modal auto-open, 2) Customer verbal findings access control is properly restricted. The Jobs page stone modal now correctly enforces admin-only access to Edit/Save buttons and Upload Scan functionality, matching the behavior of the Stones page.
